title: palicourea abbreviata
intro: Palicourea abbreviata, also known as the "Short-stemmed Palicourea" or "Mazateca", is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Palicourea abbreviata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
